title: Execute MeshCore app/client smoke test on physical BLE target
description: Why this exists: docs/meshcore-smoke-test.md defines the repeatable smoke procedure, but full pass/fail evidence requires a BLE-capable target and a real MeshCore client/app. What needs to be done: flash a MeshCore-BLE LICHEN gateway image, run the documented smoke procedure with a MeshCore app or compatible CLI, capture firmware logs/client observations, and file exact failure Beads. Acceptance criteria: client/app version/date/device recorded; firmware commit/build command and board recorded; BLE discovery/pairing/MTU/raw-frame/message ingress/egress/unsupported-operation/disconnect evidence captured; failures create exact blocker Beads with logs.
notes: Blocked for physical/client resources. Requires a BLE-capable target flashed with CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_MESHCORE_BLE=y, serial console capture, and a real MeshCore mobile app or compatible BLE client/CLI to execute docs/meshcore-smoke-test.md. No physical radios/boards/phones/BLE client access are available in this no-hardware session. No-hardware prerequisite procedure is documented in project-LICHEN-9c4y.11.
